projects.question: Tell me about one DevOps project you've worked on.
What problem was your project trying to solve?
Which technologies and tools did you use in your project?
What was your specific role and contribution in the project?
What was the biggest challenge you faced while working on the project?
Describe how you automated part of your project's deployment or infrastructure.
How did you ensure reliability, scalability, or availability in your project?
If you had to redesign your project from scratch today, what architectural or DevOps improvements would you make, and why?
Imagine your project's production environment goes down immediately after deployment. Walk me through how you would investigate the issue, communicate with stakeholders, and restore service.
Suppose your project suddenly needs to support ten times more users than originally expected. Explain the infrastructure, deployment, monitoring, and scaling changes you would make.
